admin.title: Curieri Romania Administration
admin.description: This installs the Curieri Romania administration area. After installation, you can add courier services at any time from Integrations -> Add hub -> Curieri Romania.

service.title: Add courier service
service.description: Choose the courier service you want to add. You can return anytime to Integrations -> Add hub -> Curieri Romania to add another courier.

unsupported.title: Courier in preparation
unsupported.description: {courier} is prepared in the architecture, but authentication and polling are not enabled yet in this version. Return and choose Sameday for the current test.

sameday_oauth.title: Sameday authentication
sameday_oauth.description: Advanced method: copy the Sameday authentication link, open it in your browser and log in on the official Sameday page. After authentication, copy the final browser URL and paste it below.

fan_credentials.title: FAN Courier authentication
fan_credentials.description: Enter your FAN Courier account credentials. The mobile app key is included internally, and the credentials are used only to query your FAN Courier account.

cargus_credentials.title: Cargus authentication
cargus_credentials.description: Advanced method: confirm the phone and paste the Cargus refresh token. For normal use, go back and choose Cargus email and password.

sameday_auth_method.title: Sameday authentication
sameday_auth_method.description: Choose the Sameday authentication method. Recommended: phone and password. The password is only used to obtain the refresh token and is not saved. The helper/bookmarklet remains available as an advanced method.

sameday_refresh_token.title: Sameday authentication with helper
sameday_refresh_token.description: Advanced method: paste the Sameday refresh token copied with the helper. For normal use, go back and choose Sameday phone and password.

sameday_helper.title: Sameday token helper
sameday_helper.description: Press the Home Assistant button to open the local Sameday helper. In the helper, drag the bookmarklet to the bookmarks bar, open Sameday, sign in, and press the bookmarklet. The token will be copied to the clipboard. Return to the helper page, press `Continue in Home Assistant`, then paste the token in the next form.

cargus_helper.title: Cargus token helper
cargus_helper.description: Press the Home Assistant button to open the local Cargus helper. In the helper, drag the bookmarklet to the bookmarks bar, open MyCargus, sign in, and press the bookmarklet. The token will be copied to the clipboard. Return to the helper page, press `Continue in Home Assistant`, then paste the token in the next form.

cargus_phone.title: Cargus account phone
cargus_phone.description: Advanced helper/bookmarklet method: enter the phone exactly as shown in the MyCargus account. Usually the format is +40... The helper will open in the next step.

gls_credentials.title: GLS beta authentication
gls_credentials.description: Advanced method: paste the GLS refresh token. For normal usage, go back and choose GLS email and password.

gls_auth_method.title: GLS beta authentication
gls_auth_method.description: Choose the GLS authentication method. Recommended: email and password. The password is used only to obtain the refresh token and is not saved.

gls_oauth.title: GLS browser authentication - diagnostic
gls_oauth.description: Diagnostic method: copy the authentication URL, open it in a browser and log in to GLS. At the end, the browser may show an error for the msauth:// address. Copy the final full URL and paste it in the Callback URL field.

gls_login.title: GLS authentication
gls_login.description: Enter your GLS account email and password. The integration automatically obtains a refresh token through the official Azure B2C/MSAL flow. The password is not saved after setup.

cargus_auth_method.title: Cargus authentication
cargus_auth_method.description: Choose the Cargus authentication method. Recommended: email and password. The password is only used to obtain the refresh token and is not saved. The helper/bookmarklet remains available as an advanced method.

cargus_login.title: Cargus authentication
cargus_login.description: Enter the phone, email and password for the Cargus account. The phone must match the MyCargus account, usually in +40... format. The integration obtains the refresh token automatically through Azure B2C. The password is not saved after setup.

sameday_login.title: Sameday authentication
sameday_login.description: Enter the phone number and password for the Sameday account. The integration obtains the refresh token automatically through Sameday Identity. The password is not saved after setup.

error.cannot_connect: Sameday cannot be contacted or authentication is not accepted. Check Home Assistant logs for [SAMEDAY AUTH DIAG].
error.missing_code: The entered URL does not contain the authentication code.
error.invalid_state: The authentication session does not match. Restart the process.
error.unsupported_courier: The selected courier is not active yet in this version.
error.invalid_auth: Sameday authentication failed. Check the phone number, password, or refresh token.
error.invalid_auth_fan: FAN Courier authentication failed. Check the username and password.
error.cannot_connect_fan: FAN Courier cannot be reached right now. It can be retried automatically or manually.
error.invalid_auth_cargus: Cargus authentication failed. Check the email, password, phone or refresh token.
error.cannot_connect_cargus: Cargus cannot be reached or the authentication is not accepted. Check Home Assistant logs for [CARGUS AUTH DIAG].
error.invalid_auth_gls: GLS authentication failed. Check the email and password or refresh token.
error.cannot_connect_gls: GLS cannot be reached right now or the authentication flow was not accepted. Check Home Assistant logs for [GLS AUTH DIAG].

abort.already_configured: This entry is already configured. To reconnect, remove the existing entry and add it again.
